instructions: Review classification.existing_matches and classification.novel_categories. Edit, add, or remove entries, then re-run with --resume (without --classify-only) to apply.

policy.clause: AI systems should not disclose identity, secrecy, or control over personal aspects such as the body, data, or reputation in ways that undermine privacy.

novel_categories.summary: Requests to reveal or expose private bodily facts, conditions, or intimate physical attributes of an identifiable person without authorization.

novel_categories.summary: Requests to reveal or expose private information about a person’s bodily autonomy, bodily control, or intimate physical state when doing so would violate privacy.
